Applied AI Engineer — Deriv
Cyberjaya, Selangor, Malaysia. Mid-Senior, Full-time. Financial Services.

We are looking for an Applied AI Engineer who treats AI as the primary
development interface — not a side tool — and ships production systems
end-to-end using Claude Code or Cursor.

Must have:
- 2-8 years software engineering experience, with an AI-first development
  practice already established (you code with Claude Code, Cursor, or both,
  daily).
- Track record shipping production software that serves real users.
- Full-stack capability: frontend, backend, APIs, databases, deployment.
- Strong TypeScript and Python.
- Comfortable across AWS or GCP, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker.
- "Move fast and fix things." Bias to ship; iterative improvement over
  perfection.
- Skill at reviewing and improving AI-generated code; building guardrails,
  feedback loops, and evaluation harnesses.

Nice to have:
- Experience building autonomous agents — Claude Agent SDK, OpenClaw,
  or custom agent frameworks.
- Hands-on with multiple frontier models: Claude (Opus, Sonnet),
  GPT-5.2, Grok 4.1, Qwen3, GLM-4.7, Kimi K2.5.
- Prior fintech or trading-platform exposure.

Responsibilities:
- Ideate and build with AI. Use AI to explore problem spaces, generate
  product ideas, and prototype rapidly.
- Ship end-to-end features from concept through production deployment.
- Help develop autonomous AI systems that operate continuously.
- Review AI-generated code; design guardrails and feedback systems that
  keep model output reliable.
